title: Vanillamon [Cobblemon]
description: A cobblemon addon adding 24 new fakemon based on minecraft mobs, with many more to come!
body:
# **_Discover 24 New Fakemon based on Minecraft Mobs!_**

Vanillamon is an addon for Cobblemon currently adding 24 new pokemon based on several minecraft mobs. All of the mobs are found naturally spawning, and are fully ready to be used! Although there are only 24 pokemon currently in the addon, there are plans for many more to roll out over time across multiple updates. For more information on evolutions, see below!

_Note that the mod adds three starters which are meant to be added to the starter screen via config (Peakaboom, Stroddler, and Buckid), although they can still be found as commonly as the other cobblemon starters in the wilderness._

_requires Gravel's Extended Battles..._


<details>
<summary>Evolution Info</summary>

Peakaboom > Creeplant at Level 16
Creeplant > Miscreepant at level 32
Stroddler > Stryder at Level 16
Stryder > Stritan at level 32
Buckid > Vikink at level 16
Vikink > Squimpale at level 32
Stringlett > Macabrula at level 30 at night
Stringlett > Venachnid at level 30 in a cave biome
Beelder > Hivee at level 12
Hivee > Queebee at level 24
Egglet > Nesten at level 26 when Female
Egglet > Chickatrice at level 26 when male
Moobloom > Moontain using a Moon Stone
Pigtato > Tunnaboar at level 42 
Copptomaton > Profector after surviving a battle after taking 100 damage, and holding an iron block.

</details>
